response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer with nearly two decades of hands-on experience, genuine open-source commitment (founder of GISCollective, D-language libraries, FOSS4G speaker), and solid Linux/DevOps grounding that fits the firm's open-source and digital-sovereignty focus. However, this is an executive leadership role requiring client-facing work in German at minimum C1, and his German is listed as basic — a hard disqualifier for a consulting lead in this market. His career is also almost entirely senior IC work: there is no demonstrated experience leading and mentoring a team as a formal manager, running technical project management, or owning architecture governance (UML, requirements management) at the level the role demands, and Python is absent from his stack.
strengths: Deep, polyglot full-stack experience (web, mobile, embedded, low-latency systems) with strong Linux and DevOps skills
Authentic open-source track record: founded and runs GISCollective, maintains D-language libraries, conference speaker
Proven educator and mentor through multi-day courses, workshops, and code katas — useful for team development
concerns: German is basic; the role requires minimum C1 for client advisory work in Germany
No formal leadership, team management, or executive-level experience — career is senior/staff IC roles
No evidence of Python, UML, requirements management, or formal IT-security/compliance advisory experience

key_factors.factor: Open-source and Linux depth aligned with company focus
